title: dryopteris crinigera
intro: Dryopteris crinigera, also known as the Japanese male fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Dryopteris. Traditionally used in Asian medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating joint pain, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Dryopteris crinigera can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
